label: About
title: About The Indigo Proofing Wash
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 16 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Komachi, by Meitei and Blue Shit, by Mica Levi, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became The Indigo Proofing Wash: A single finished abstract expressionist plate: a wide charcoal handmade-paper field fills the frame, leaving more than sixty percent open, quiet negative space. The dominant form is the paper itself, smoky and toothy, with a faint warm umber undertone. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against dominant charcoal paper field, ragged lower deckle edge, and cobalt pigment smear ridge.

typography.body_family: 'DFE Newsreader', Iowan Old Style, Georgia, serif
typography.rationale: Fraunces gives the title an organic, seed-label quality; Newsreader keeps the explanation calm and readable.
